Motion To Amend Order Regarding Deposit Of Funds To Blocked Account For Minor Plaintiff Kimberly Jovel
Off Calendar Jul-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Motion to Amend Order Regarding Deposit of Funds to a Blocked Account for Minor Kimberly Jovel.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Monica Castillo, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and Petitioner: Fabiola Gudiel, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Kimberly Jovel not present in court.
Petitioner not present.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is amended as follows:
Total Settlement: $5000.00
Attorney's Fees: $1250.00 payable to Law Firm of Sarrail, Castillo, & Hall, LLP
Costs: $0.00
A net balance of $3750.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Bank of America, 15 Ocean Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94122 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on Oct-18-2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Karen Uchiyama, Esq, attorney at law, (415-563-9301), for Jonathan Britton, Defendant and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

After hearing arguments from Defendant's counsel, Court adopts the tentative Ruling as follows; DEFENDANT JOHN BRITTON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, complaint sufficiently alleges facts to state each cause of action. Defendant and defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with CRC 3.1113. Late filed-reply is stricken. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. The Court orders the Defendant's counsel to answer in 10 days. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk B. Paredes, Not reported (501)
